sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25397" key="dianohte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διανο-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n25397.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must think,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0059.tlg034.perseus-grc1:626d" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">626d</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.434b</biblScope></bibl>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
